findings.blocker: phind.com is DOWN / decommissioned. Both https://www.phind.com/agent and https://www.phind.com return Vercel 404 DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND (Code: DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND, IDs: icn1::q4m47-1777028186132-beb5c558c634 and icn1::q7kzg-1777028210447-a83aebac277d). 'This deployment cannot be found' message from Vercel edge.

status_detail: BLOCKED by upstream service unavailability. phind.com appears to have been taken down or deployment removed. The Vercel edge returns DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND for both root and /agent paths, meaning no product chat UI exists to submit a prompt through. Consequently, the generic_sse 239B envelope cannot be exercised. Recommendation: remove phind from services=127 registry, or verify whether phind pivoted to a different hostname. No APF request was generated because there is no client to request from.
errors: phind.com returns Vercel 404 DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND for both / and /agent; service appears decommissioned
